name: Fruit Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small nonmetal bowl, stir together apricot nectar and cornstarch.
2. Stir in brandy, honey, and allspice.
3. Cook on 100% power for 1 to 2 minutes or until thickened and bubbly, stirring every 30 seconds.
4. Stir in the fruit.
5. Cook on 100% power for an additional 30 to 45 seconds or until heated through.
6. Chill thoroughly if desired. Serve hot or cold.
